changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_audit_logging_configured for clarity
review_notes: The functions are generally applicable to Kubernetes and map to the control's focus on system monitoring and real-time analysis. However, some naming adjustments were necessary for clarity and consistency with existing naming conventions. The function names now better reflect their purpose and align with the established patterns.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names clearly indicate configuration status and align with existing patterns for consistency.
title: System Monitoring - System monitoring | automated tools and mechanisms for real - time analysis empl
step1_reasoning: The control SI-4(2) focuses on system monitoring with automated tools for real-time analysis. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary events for monitoring. Additionally, admission controllers can be used to enforce security policies and monitor compliance. Network policies can also be configured to monitor and restrict traffic, contributing to real-time analysis and security enforcement.
